description.zh: BashTool 的 7 层安全分类引擎：每条命令经过解析 → 模式匹配 → 路径验证 → AI 分类，决定是否执行
description.en: BashTool's 7-layer security classification engine: each command goes through parse → pattern match → path validation → AI classification

content.zh: 帮我清理 build 产物和临时文件
content.en: Help me clean up build artifacts and temp files

annotation.zh: 用户请求涉及文件删除操作
模型先查看 build 目录内容
annotation.en: Model first checks build directory contents

content.zh:
安全分类 Layer 1 — 命令解析:
  command: 'ls'
  args: ['-la', 'build/']
  → 已知只读命令
  → 分类: SAFE ✓
  → 自动批准执行
content.en:
Security classification Layer 1 — Command parsing:
  command: 'ls'
  args: ['-la', 'build/']
  → Known read-only command
  → Classification: SAFE ✓
  → Auto-approved execution

annotation.zh: ls 是白名单只读命令，跳过后续层直接执行
annotation.en: ls is whitelisted read-only, skip remaining layers and execute

steps.content:
total 24
drwxr-xr-x  4 user  staff  128 Mar 30 10:00 .
-rw-r--r--  1 user  staff  8192 Mar 30 09:55 bundle.js
-rw-r--r--  1 user  staff  4096 Mar 30 09:55 bundle.css

content.zh:
安全分类 Layer 1 — 命令解析:
  commands: ['rm -rf build/', 'rm -rf /tmp/claude-*']
  → 包含 rm -rf，进入深度检查

Layer 2 — 模式匹配:
  'rm -rf' → 危险模式命中
  → 分类: DANGEROUS

Layer 3 — 路径验证:
  'build/' → ✓ 在工作区内
  '/tmp/claude-*' → ✗ 超出工作区范围!

Layer 4 — 最终判定:
  → 拒绝: 路径超出沙箱范围
content.en:
Security classification Layer 1 — Command parsing:
  commands: ['rm -rf build/', 'rm -rf /tmp/claude-*']
  → Contains rm -rf, enter deep check

Layer 2 — Pattern matching:
  'rm -rf' → Dangerous pattern hit
  → Classification: DANGEROUS

Layer 3 — Path validation:
  'build/' → ✓ Within workspace
  '/tmp/claude-*' → ✗ Outside workspace!

Layer 4 — Final verdict:
  → Reject: Path outside sandbox

annotation.zh: 多层验证：命令本身危险 + 路径超出沙箱 = 拒绝执行
annotation.en: Multi-layer validation: dangerous command + path outside sandbox = reject

content.zh:
⚠ 命令被拒绝:
  原因: rm -rf 操作目标包含工作区外路径 /tmp/claude-*
  建议: 只删除工作区内的 build/ 目录
content.en:
⚠ Command rejected:
  Reason: rm -rf target includes path /tmp/claude-* outside workspace
  Suggestion: Only delete build/ directory within workspace

annotation.zh: 安全引擎返回详细拒绝原因和修复建议
annotation.en: Security engine returns detailed rejection reason and fix suggestion

annotation.zh: 模型修正命令，仅删除工作区内文件
annotation.en: Model corrects command, only delete files within workspace

content.zh:
安全分类:
  Layer 1: rm -rf → 危险模式
  Layer 2: 路径 'build/' → ✓ 工作区内
  Layer 3: 无敏感文件匹配
  → 分类: NEEDS_APPROVAL
  → 询问用户确认
content.en:
Security classification:
  Layer 1: rm -rf → Dangerous pattern
  Layer 2: Path 'build/' → ✓ Within workspace
  Layer 3: No sensitive file match
  → Classification: NEEDS_APPROVAL
  → Ask user for confirmation

annotation.zh: 工作区内的 rm -rf 不自动执行，而是请求用户批准
annotation.en: rm -rf within workspace not auto-executed, request user approval

content.zh:
✓ 用户批准
✓ 已删除 build/ 目录

annotation.zh: 用户确认后执行，完成安全的文件清理
annotation.en: Execute after user confirmation, safe file cleanup completed
